transcript:
CALLER: Hello, mere thyroid ki dawai khatam hone wali hai. Kya bina appointment ke refill ho sakta hai?
AGENT: Aapka naam aur doctor ka naam bata sakte hain please?
CALLER: Pooja Wankhede. Doctor thi Dr. Pallavi Nambiar. Last visit koi 6-7 weeks pehle tha.
AGENT: Dekh raha hoon... haan, aapka record hai. Eltroxin 50mcg likha tha. Abhi refill ke liye Dr. Nambiar ko request bhejta hoon. Unka approval zyada tar 24 ghante mein aata hai.
CALLER: Aur agar 3 mahine se zyada ho gaye toh?
AGENT: Toh ek short follow-up consultation zyada safer hogi, kyunki dosage change ho sakti hai. Lekin abhi 6-7 weeks mein koi problem nahi honi chahiye. Main request bhej deta hoon.
CALLER: Theek hai. Shukriya.
AGENT: Request submit ho gayi. Kal tak SMS ya call milega aapko.
